summary: Scrutiny for runtime-surface-adoption was overridden because the only failing validator remained the documented pre-existing packages/edge-worker screenshot-upload-hooks suite, which is unrelated to the repository-association refactor work completed in this milestone. Typecheck and lint passed, and milestone features had targeted green tests, build validation, and F1 evidence.

test.details: pnpm test:packages:run -- --maxWorkers=8 fails in packages/edge-worker/test/EdgeWorker.screenshot-upload-hooks.test.ts with undefined screenshot hook matcher expectations.

override.reason: Mission AGENTS.md documents the screenshot-upload-hooks suite as pre-existing unrelated edge-worker validation noise. The runtime milestone features validated with targeted routing/lifecycle/prompt/integration tests, workspace build, and F1 evidence, so this unrelated baseline suite is deferred.
